name: Nobara Linux
tagline: GloriousEggroll's gaming-focused Fedora with ProtonGE baked in
description: Nobara Linux is a Fedora fork maintained by Thomas Crider (GloriousEggroll), the developer behind Proton-GE — the custom build of Valve's Proton compatibility layer. Nobara ships with ProtonGE pre-installed, a patched kernel for lower gaming latency, OBS Studio fixes, NVIDIA driver tooling, and a curated set of multimedia codecs that Fedora omits for licensing reasons. It targets gamers and streamers who want Fedora's modern toolchain without the usual post-install configuration work. Updates track Fedora closely, making it more current than most gaming-focused distributions.
